metadata.description: Synthesized investigation findings — content NOT captured in network-map.json or launch-history.json
metadata.goal: Identify the deployer's next fresh wallet after it gets funded but before create_and_buy
metadata.raw_data_location: data/results/raw/ — full API responses for all investigations

funding_path_evolution.description: The deployer varies the funding path every time. This is the #1 challenge for L11 detection.

history.path: Coinbase CB9 → OG deployer (direct, no fresh wallet)

funding_path_evolution.pattern: Intermediary changes: Hub (x3), OG (x1), prior deployer (x1), side-project (x1), direct (x1). On-ramp also changed.
funding_path_evolution.implication: Must monitor ALL known network wallets for 10-18 SOL outflows to fresh addresses, not just on-ramps.

profit_extraction_map.description: Seven routes for extracting profits from the network.

route_a.name: Collection Wallet Route
route_a.flow: Deployers (L4-L10) + Ed4UGBWK + Bundles + Hub + Eggsheeran + JETNUT → Collection Wallet (Bra1HUNK) → Token Millionaire (49mvMufi, Fireblocks)

route_b.name: Secondary Aggregator Route
route_b.flow: OG Deployer + Hub + Bundles 1/3/5 + 6UrYwo9F relay → 2q8nSJgC → Token Millionaire (49mvMufi, Fireblocks)

route_c.name: Fireblocks Passthrough Route
route_c.flow: L7 Deployer ($31.6K) + Bundles 1/3/5/6 + Hub ($1.8K) → 9exPdTUV (Fireblocks passthrough) → 9cDDJ5g2 (Fireblocks Custody shared wallet). On-chain trail ends here.
route_c.note: Route C terminates at Fireblocks Custody (9cDDJ5g2), a shared infrastructure wallet (isUserAddress=false). Prior claim that it feeds into Route B via 2q8nSJgC is UNVERIFIABLE on-chain. The $49K may reach Token Millionaire through internal Fireblocks processes, but we cannot trace it.

route_d.name: Direct Coinbase Deposit 2
route_d.flow: Hub ($5.2K) + l9_funder ($3.1K) + jetnut_network ($2.7K) + Bundle 5 ($2.5K) + OG ($1.1K) + Bundles 2/3 → BR1HiYtc (Coinbase Deposit 2) → Coinbase hot wallets

route_e.name: Primary Coinbase Cashout
route_e.flow: Rollbit Treasury ($235K winnings) + Hub ($13.8K) + OG ($11.3K) + L4 ($4.9K) + Bundles 2/5/6 ($5.6K) + Eggsheeran ($1.8K) + 9cDDJ5g2 ($510) → coinbase_deposit (J6YUyB4P) → CB1-CB10 ($265K+)
route_e.note: Largest single cashout route. Rollbit winnings ($235K) dominate inflows.

route_f.name: Rollbit Gambling Cycle
route_f.flow: CB1-CB10 ($184K) + L8 ($4.3K) + profit_pass_2 ($5.9K) + Bundles + deployers → rollbit_deposit (RB3dQF6T) → Rollbit Treasury ($233K)
route_f.note: Money cycles: network profits → Coinbase cashout → Coinbase sends to rollbit_deposit → Rollbit gambling.

route_g.name: USDC Conversion + Binance
route_g.flow: OG/Eggsheeran/L8/LFS/Bundle 4/l9_funder → cold_usdc_2 (EAcUbdoi) → SOL-USDC swaps + 7RLD6F9S (Fireblocks, $4K) + yNanvu8H ($2.2K USDC). Also: OG/L7 → routes_binance → Binance Deposit Fx7gAJpk ($1K) + 7RLD6F9S ($2.6K)
route_g.volume: $6.6K to 7RLD6F9S Fireblocks + $2.2K USDC to yNanvu8H + $1K to Binance

endpoint.token_millionaire: 49mvMufixEbUMzZEUVAnbQ8hLLuEWy789XfKUNTz7wCv — Fireblocks Custody. Sends $45.3M to Large Funding Source. NOT deployer-controlled.
endpoint.total_extracted: $400K+ confirmed. Routes E and F overlap significantly — Rollbit winnings flow to Coinbase, Coinbase funds flow back to Rollbit.

profit_extraction_map.fireblocks_caveat: Arkham labels many wallets 'Fireblocks Custody' on Solana — broad label covering any wallet interacting with Fireblocks infrastructure. Does NOT mean same entity.

confirmed_network_labels.description: Nansen/Arkham labels confirmed for network wallets — useful for fingerprinting
confirmed_network_labels.bundle_6: Axiom-funded (NOT Coinbase like Bundles 1-5). Only 11 connections vs 18-22. Operationally distinct.

bqp79wmk_evidence_chain.description: Evidence proving BqP79Wmk is deployer's personal trading wallet
evidence: 1. Trades ALL 9 deployer tokens (covering all 10 launches): DOGWIFXRP $129K, WFXRP $49K, ARKXRP $8.2K, XAIC $6.1K, GSBANK $1.9K, QTX $1K, XRPEP3 $766, TROLLXRP $627, RXRP $431. Early buyer on L1-L3/L5/L6/L10, later buyer on L4/L7/L8/L9. Verified from Nansen counterparties (raw: l10-suspicious-buyers-profiles.json).
2. Funded via MoonPay MP1 — deployer's own on-ramp for L10
3. Receives $629 from Large Funding Source (Fireblocks) — deployer infrastructure
4. First funded on L1 launch day (2025-06-15)
5. Buys at +6 seconds on L10 — advance knowledge
6. Funder (GoonPump 231fshU8) ALSO trades deployer tokens (WFXRP) and receives from LFS
7. Cashout FKjuwJzH is Crypto.com Deposit (Arkham confirmed) — $7.2K to Crypto.com
8. Funder sends to MEXC Deposit — multiple exchange usage for personal ops
bqp79wmk_evidence_chain.pipeline: MoonPay/Bitget → GoonPump (231fshU8) → BqP79Wmk → FKjuwJzH (Crypto.com Deposit) → Crypto.com

upstream_unresolved.8QCVZ7KL: $701 to GoonPump, Nansen: 'High Balance'. Needs profiling.

bqp79wmk_evidence_chain.l11_implication: GoonPump and BqP79Wmk will likely appear as early buyers on L11. Monitor both.

uninvestigated_counterparties.description: Minor counterparties discovered during profiling but not yet identified

A9eAH6Az.note: Balanced in/out suggests trading counterparty or exchange wallet.

jetnut_network.7mb5n6uw: $2,790 out (2 txs — 30+1 SOL sent Mar 21). Needs identification.

unverified_claims.ed4ugbwk_rollbit_deposits: RB5KKB7h and RB2Yz3VS cited as Ed4UGBWK Rollbit deposits but no raw API data backs them. 2026-03-24 Arkham transfers query returned 0 Rollbit matches. May be transcription errors.
